## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./...` passes
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated where it makes sense
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Docs (README / flags / metrics) updated if behaviour changed
